caption: Figure 1. mRNA-EditFlow represents an existing full-length transcript as 5'UTR + CDS + 3'UTR, samples region-aware CTMC edit trajectories, applies hard constraint masks for CDS protein identity, frame, legality, edit budget, length and motifs, then reranks constraint-safe local edits with multi-objective fusion before T1-T7 audit. The figure supports a constrained local-optimization claim only, not unconstrained de novo SOTA or wet-lab validation.
claim_policy: Figure 1 may describe full-length constrained edit-flow optimization over 5'UTR + CDS + 3'UTR. It must not depict MEF as unconstrained de novo generation, external SOTA reproduction, or wet-lab validated design.

constraint_callouts.language: The editable object is 5'UTR + CDS + 3'UTR, not CDS-only or UTR-only.
CDS edits are constrained by a synonymous codon lattice and exact protein identity.
Reading frame, start/stop validity, alphabet, and legal transcript checks are hard gates.
Local edit budget, target length, Kozak/uAUG/polyA, and motif controls are evaluated explicitly.
Outputs are constrained local optimizations from existing sources, not full de novo SOTA or wet-lab validation.

flowchart LR A["Public full-transcript source
Existing mRNA records with 5'UTR + CDS + 3'UTR and CDS coordinates."] B["Region and phase annotation
Track nucleotide region, CDS codon phase, source length, motifs, and edit budget."] C["CTMC edit bridge
Align source/target transcripts and sample gap-free intermediate edit states."] D["Stage A edit-flow generator
Predict insert, substitute, and delete rates under region-aware context."] E["Hard-constraint masks
Apply legal sequence checks, CDS synonymous lattice, protein identity, frame, length, motif, and budget gates."] F["Candidate pool
Generate constraint-safe local edits from the source transcript."] G["Multi-objective ranker / fusion
Rank candidates with TE proxy, CAI/GC, novelty, source-aware recall, and fusion modes."] H["T1-T7 evaluation gates
Audit legality, distribution, novelty, protein identity, edit budget, length, motif, and frame."] I["Selected constrained local optimization
Report proxy/offline gains only under exact hard constraints and explicit claim boundaries."] A -->|parse full-length regions| B B -->|align source and target edits| C C -->|train edit rates| D D -->|decode with masks| E E -->|filter invalid edits| F F -->|score and fuse objectives| G G -->|audit T1-T7| H H -->|select reportable candidates| I E -->|hard constraints must remain exact-1| H classDef constraint fill:#fff7e6,stroke:#d48806,color:#262626 classDef audit fill:#f6ffed,stroke:#389e0d,color:#262626 class E constraint class H audit
